frontend-dev: We are looking for a Frontend Developer with expertise in React, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript. You will be responsible for building responsive and interactive user interfaces.
java-dev: Join our team as a Java Developer. Requirements: Strong Java skills, Spring Boot, Hibernate, and experience with REST APIs and Microservices.
data-scientist: Seeking a Data Scientist proficient in Python, SQL, and Machine Learning. Experience with Pandas and Scikit-Learn is essential.
fullstack-mern: Looking for a MERN Stack Developer. You should have solid experience with MongoDB, Express.js, React, and Node.js.
devops-eng: We need a DevOps Engineer to manage our AWS infrastructure. Skills required: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and Terraform.
